locations.notes: First full discovery run over the 5-county MSA (prior state was a legacy 2-org backfill). Enumerated ~60 entities (5 counties, ~25 school districts, ~25 cities, state portal); scouted 21 of them before the discovery budget was exhausted, yielding 9 confident sources (coverage 0.15, below the 0.90 target) at run_quality 0.71 (above the 0.60 threshold). Per CLAUDE.md's definition of done, budget_exhausted also flips status to ready_for_scrape so leads can be extracted from what was found; remaining ~39 entities and 12 rejected candidates are listed as gaps in output/us-tx-austin-msa/20260716T074440Z/run_manifest.json for the next weekly run.
